_comment: Per-field write policies for IRIS Core State. See MEMORY-SPEC.md Section 4 + Phase 2.

_confirmation_policy_values.never: No confirmation required. Write proceeds if source is allowed.
_confirmation_policy_values.on_change: Confirmation required only when overwriting an existing non-null value.
_confirmation_policy_values.always_if_non_explicit: Confirmation required unless source is user_explicit.
_confirmation_policy_values.always: Confirmation always required, even for user_explicit writes.

_overwrite_behavior_values.replace: New value replaces old value directly.
_overwrite_behavior_values.merge: New value is merged with existing (used for lists/sets like tone_preferences.avoid).
_overwrite_behavior_values.archive_then_replace: Old value is written to audit log before replacement.

identity.notes: Identity fields almost never change. Highest protection. system_canonical cannot write here.

identity.name.notes: Name should almost never change. Requires explicit confirmation always.

identity.business_name.notes: Business name change is a significant event. Always confirm, always archive old.

current_goals.notes: Goals can change often. Archive old value on replacement so history is preserved.

current_goals.primary.notes: Primary goal is high-signal. Stale after 21 days. Archive on change.

offer_stack.notes: Pricing is highest-stakes field. Always requires confirmation. system_canonical cannot write.

offer_stack.products.notes: Individual product entries. Same protection as parent offer_stack.

tone_preferences.notes: Tone is stable. No expiry. system_canonical cannot write.

tone_preferences.avoid.notes: Avoid list grows over time. Merge (not replace) so items are not accidentally dropped.

active_commitments.notes: Commitments are time-sensitive. Stale after 14 days without update.

active_project_context.notes: Set deliberately, cleared deliberately. Never inferred from recent chat.

_default.notes: Default policy applied when no specific policy is defined for a field path.
